security_note: No API key is included. Use TRIPO_API_KEY from local environment.

prompting_strategy.character: Ask for neutral A-pose/full body/clean silhouette/separate accessories/no text/no logo.
prompting_strategy.creature_robot: Ask for hard-surface silhouette, readable core shapes, no famous robot/franchise references.
prompting_strategy.prop: Ask for separate object, game environment prop, no readable text/logos, compact silhouette.
prompting_strategy.boss: Ask for imposing silhouette and modular parts; consider segmented parts for separate wings/core/appendages.

jobs.prompt: original cyberpunk underground surgeon woman, neutral A-pose, full body, black clinic coat, chrome fingers, utility belt, clean silhouette, asymmetrical medical shoulder light, game-ready character base mesh, no text, no logo
jobs.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, copyrighted character, extra limbs, fused fingers, distorted face, weapon fused to body
jobs.notes: Generate as character base; retopo in Blender if needed.

jobs.prompt: original cyberpunk rainmarket noodle vendor, neutral A-pose, layered plastic rain poncho, augmented visor, portable cooking harness, friendly silhouette, full body game asset, no text, no logo
jobs.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, copyrighted character, extra limbs, distorted anatomy, unreadable clutter

jobs.prompt: original cyberpunk street gang melee enemy, neutral A-pose, slim agile silhouette, patched rain jacket, respirator mask, one separate neon knife accessory, combat boots, magenta cyan accents, game-ready enemy base mesh, no text, no logo
jobs.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, famous character, extra limbs, fused weapon, messy silhouette
jobs.notes: Separate weapon in Blender if fused.

jobs.prompt: original cyberpunk gang bruiser enemy, neutral A-pose, bulky padded jacket, electrical baton accessory, heavy boots, visible battery backpack, readable large silhouette, game-ready base mesh, no text, no logo
jobs.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, extra arms, fused baton, distorted anatomy

jobs.prompt: original compact corporate scout drone, hovering spherical body, camera eye, fold-out laser emitter, small stabilizer fins, black white gunmetal shell, red security lights, clean game asset, no text, no logo
jobs.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, copyrighted robot, too many limbs, melted geometry
jobs.notes: Smart low poly can help repeated drones.

jobs.prompt: original corporate suppression robot, stocky biped security machine, rectangular torso, rotating shoulder cannon housings, black glass and white armor panels, red warning lights, no text, no logo, game-ready hard surface mesh
jobs.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, famous robot, organic face, extra limbs, melted parts

jobs.prompt: original cyberpunk corporate security angel drone boss, imposing symmetrical silhouette, wing-like laser arrays, black glass armor, red scanning eye, floating central core, game boss model concept, no text, no logo
jobs.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, copyrighted robot, feathered angel, human face, messy silhouette
jobs.notes: generate_parts can help separate wings/core; if using generate_parts set texture=false and pbr=false per API constraints.
